productDisplayName: Nike Men Red Manchester United Jersey
description: CompositionRed manchester united jersey made of 100% recycled polyester Dri-Fit fabric in a mesh finish, that has black and white ribbing around the round neckline with a red panel on the front and a mock collar, short red sleeves with black and white ribbed tape below the cuffs, Manchester United seal embroidered on the upper left chest, swoosh logo embroidered on the upper right chest, Man U logo on the left chest and AON printed below the swoosh on the chestFittingComfortWash careMachine was coldWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryReturn to greatness with this Manchester United football Club Soccer jersey from nike in it's team colours of red, black and white. This jersey pays homage to the incredibly successful team with strong design details like the club badge, coupled with it's official insurance sponsor, AON. The Dri-FIT performance fabric ensures breathability and comfort on and off the field.
